payload.text: Tôi muốn có một ứng dụng note, giao diện và tính năng đơn giản như apple note

**Framing the Objective**

I'm focusing on defining the user's primary need: a straightforward note app, much like Apple Notes. The interface must be clean, and the core features will be essential. The user's language is Vietnamese, so I'm keeping that in mind.


**Adding the "Magic"**

I've been thinking about the application's core functionality and decided to add "magic" through Gemini 3 Flash. I'll include features like auto-title, summarization, and text improvement. I will also incorporate a "Magic" button within the editor to trigger these features. My focus remains on a clean Apple Notes-like design with a responsive layout. I'm also planning the overall structure, including `index.html`, `index.tsx`, `App.tsx`, `types.ts`, and a `Sidebar.tsx` component.


**Defining Core Components**

Now I'm diving into component specifics. I'm focusing on `Editor.tsx`, with its text area and "Magic" integration, alongside `services/gemini.ts` for AI calls and `lib/storage.ts` for straightforward local storage. I'm also planning the Sidebar component, which will have search, a note list, and a delete button. I've begun integrating the Gemini API, especially focusing on `gemini-3-flash-preview` for speed, along with `enhanceText` service with options like 'grammar' and 'summary'. I'm also refining the data structure for notes and active note management.


**Refining Implementation Strategy**

I'm now laying out the detailed implementation steps. I will start by defining the app's metadata, then proceed with the HTML and type definitions. Next, I'll set up the Gemini service and build the core Sidebar and Editor components. I've chosen to use Lucide-react for icons and Apple-esque styling with a warm amber/yellow accent for selected notes. Finally, I will be using Flexbox for the layout, with a hidden sidebar on mobile.


**Constructing App Components**

I'm now fully immersed in the coding. I'm focusing on the `App.tsx` component, integrating everything and implementing the LocalStorage logic. I've corrected how I'll handle the `process.env` variable, now directly using it as the prompt suggested. I'm ensuring full-height with Tailwind. Gemini integration is essential, and I'm developing a "Smart Note" feature to showcase this. I've translated UI labels to Vietnamese and am considering date-fns with the `vi` locale.



**Revising Storage Strategy**

I've decided to refine the LocalStorage implementation, and I'll use `useEffect` with debounce on `notes` changes to save to LocalStorage, which should improve performance. I've also solidified my choices for the Gemini model and the prompts I'll use. I've confirmed I am correctly implementing the React 18, Tailwind, and Gemini SDK guidelines. I've made styling adjustments to resemble Apple Notes more closely, using a light gray sidebar and white main area. I'm also now implementing an automated title feature, like Apple Notes, where the first few words of a note will become the title if it's left empty. Additionally, I've outlined the first AI feature I will be adding: a summarization option ("Tóm tắt").


**Addressing Functionality Issues**

I'm now prioritizing the grammar correction feature ("Sửa lỗi") and how it will interact with the text. I'm focusing on the implementation details and how to seamlessly integrate it into the editor. I'm also ensuring the "Viết tiếp" functionality can be added seamlessly, following the same UI flow.

Ở phần tùy chỉnh mỗi thư mục:
- Cho button tùy chỉnh nằm ở vị trí sao cho ko đè vào phần hiện thị "số note" nhé
- Phần tùy chỉnh màu sắc ở mỗi thư mục hãy điều chỉnh phần hiện thị sao cho phù hợp với việc lựa chọn màu gradient
- Ở mục xóa tôi muốn khi ấn vào thì nó sẽ thực hiện hành động di chuyển thư mục kèm theo các note nằm ở trong đấy vào thùng rác. Phần thùng rác thì khi ấn vào tôi muốn nó sẽ hiện thị các phần đã bị xóa, và có một button nổi bật để cho phép xóa hẳn những thứ còn nằm trong thùng rác
Đối với ui:
- Dải màu gradient của mỗi khung ở thư mục sẽ chạy thẳng đứng từ trên xuống dưới (không nghiêng) nhé. Mỗi dải màu đều bắt đầu bằng #f1f1f1 chạy đến một màu khác.
- Các khung của ui tôi muốn tất cả đều không sử dụng shadow effect để giao diện tinh tế và tối giản hơn
